title: Colorful Bricks!
description: Bored with plain red bricks? Not anymore! This mod lets you color them all, just apply the right dye and get creative!
body:
Bored with plain red bricks? Not anymore! This mod lets you color them all, just apply the right dye and get creative!

**This mod adds:**
- 16 bricks blocks types
- 16 bricks slabs types
- 16 bricks walls types
- 16 bricks stairs types

How to make colored bricks? **_Bricks block + dye_**

This is my first mod. I wanted to make something simple and vanilla friendly as a first project. If you have any suggestions for upcoming mods please share them in comments.

If you wanna support me, consider donating! It helps a lot. Especially if I'd want to upgrade my low-end laptop haha
